articles.title: Scientists May Have Found the Blueprint of the Human Body at the Bottom of the Ocean - Yahoo
articles.description: Scientists discovered that the brainless sea anemone build their bodies with a technique common in bilaterians... which is what humans are.
articles.content:
Heres what youll learn when you read this story:
